title: Harden PR task binding guard v2
goal: Require open working PRs to bind exactly one valid Bureau task unless an explicit schema-visible exception exists.

acceptance.assertion: An open working PR without a valid task id is merge-blocking.
An open working PR with multiple task ids is merge-blocking unless an explicit exception is recorded.
The bound task must exist, belong to the expected repository claim and not be terminal without follow-up semantics.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T003 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is PR task binding guard v2.
